name: Potential Component Object Model (COM) Hijacking
notes: This rule triggers when Potential Component Object Model (COM) hijacking activities is detected. An attacker can execute malicious code by hijacking legitimate COM references.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Component Object Model Hijacking Rules
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Component Object Model Hijacking, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Component Object Model Hijacking Rules
TD_list: APPLY Potential Component Object Model (COM) Hijacking on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Component Object Model Hijacking, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Component Object Model Hijacking Rules
RED_list: Event description: Detects potential Component Object Model (COM) hijacking activities.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
